---
title: "Quiz 7 — Logistic Regression & Odds Ratios"
---

These questions check **logistic regression** — modelling the log-odds of a binary
outcome, $\operatorname{logit}(p) = b_0 + b_1 x$, and interpreting a coefficient as an
**odds ratio** $e^{b_1}$ (a percentage change in the odds). Several items refer to a
shared coefficient table shown with the questions. They mirror **Homework 7** and draw
on **Chapters 9–10** of the Lecture Notes.

Answer each question and press **Check** for instant, explained feedback. Your score
and progress are saved in this browser; press **Reset quiz** to start over.

```{=html}
<div class="quizbank" data-bank="../assets/banks/quiz7.json" data-show-title="false"></div>
<script type="module" src="../assets/quiz-engine.js"></script>
```
